nasb.text: Then he washed his face and came out; and he controlled himself and said, “Serve the meal.”

esv.text: Then he washed his face and came out. And controlling himself he said, “Serve the food.”

cnv.text: 他洗了面，然後出來，抑制著自己的感情，吩咐人說：“開飯吧。”

ccb.text: 他洗过脸出来，控制着自己的感情，吩咐人摆饭。

csbs.text: 他洗了脸出来，克制住自己，说：“摆饭吧！”
